title: Slow breathing for reducing stress: The effect of extending exhale
headline: Slow breathing for reducing stress: The effect of extending exhale
summary: A randomized controlled trial of yoga examined stress & anxiety. Slow breathing techniques are commonly used to reduce stress.
keyFindings: Slow breathing techniques are commonly used to reduce stress.
While it is believed by mind-body practitioners that extending the exhale time relative to inhale increases relaxation, this has not been demonstrated.
limitations: Single-trial result; requires replication, and self-reported outcomes may inflate apparent effects.
The practice studied (yoga) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
